meaning: n.[诗]黄昏,前夕,前日 Eve 伊夫(女子名)
examples: Richard had turned up on Christmas Eve with Tony.
On New Year's Eve we had a barbecue on the beach.
On New Year's Eve I usually give a party, which is always chaotic.
On New Year's Eve, an Uber driver struck and killed a six-year-old girl in San Francisco.
On the eve of Christmas 2007, quite a few obituaries for incandescent light bulbs were penned.
